narrative: Trump’s Iran strike threat triggers sharp risk-off deleveraging as WTI crude surges — USD/JPY tests 160.53 amid 287bp SOFR-TONA carry; gold lower -0.57%; equities -1.62%; DXY +0.18%; VIX 20.8. USD leads G10 (+0.96% avg) while AUD lags (-1.29%) on a 2.25% bilateral spread; GBP/USD IV at 11.0% vs HV30 6.4% signals high hedging demand. Watch ECB policy announcement at 12:15 UTC and BoJ on June 16.
